content: Add IPC channels and types for case export/import
Create caseExporter.ts - handles manifest generation, file copying, encryption
Create caseImporter.ts - handles decryption, validation, database import
Implement EXPORT_COMPLETE_CASE IPC handler with progress callbacks
Implement IMPORT_COMPLETE_CASE IPC handler with progress callbacks
Create ExportCaseDialog component with password setup and security warning
Create ImportCaseDialog component with password entry and conflict resolution
Add Export PULSE File button to CaseDetail page
Add Import Case button to Dashboard
Test export/import flow with small case
Test export/import flow with large case (>7GB warning)
